title: cynoglossum heterocarpum
intro: Cynoglossum heterocarpum is a perennial plant species commonly known as the variable-fruit or heterocarpic tongue flower, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum heterocarpum is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
